title: cerosora microphylla
intro: Cerosora microphylla, also known as the Asian basket fern, is a type of fern native to Asia, characterized by its small size and unique basket-like fronds. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cerosora microphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tonics and ointments.
